titleStmt.title: SII 5.881: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 881. (A.R. No. 18 of 1896). ON THE EAST WALL OF THE SIVA TEMPLE AT SIVAPURAM NEAR KADAMBATTUR; SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiru maṉṉi vaḷara Irunila maṭant Aiyum poṟceyap pāvaiyum cirttaṉic cel
viyum taṉ perun=te viyarā(k)ki Iṉpuṟa neṭutiyal Ūḻiuḷ Iṭaituṟaināṭum tuṭarvaṉa
velip paṭar vaṉavāciyum cuḷḷi cūḻ matiḷ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟkarumaraṇ maṇṇai
kkaṭakkamum porukaṭal Īḻattaraiyartam muṭiyum Āṅkavar tevimaRead teviya.roṅkeḻil muṭi
yum muṉivarRead muṉṉavar.pakkal teṉṉavaṉ vaiytta cun=ta ramuṭiyum In=ti ra ṉāramuma teṇṭiṟai Īḻa
maṇṭala muḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaik keraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭuṅ kulataṉamākiya palar pukaḻ
muṭiyuñ ceṅkatir mālaiyuñ caṅkatirvelait tolperuṅkāvaṟ palapaḻan=tī yvuñ ceru
viṟ ciṉavi l Irupattorukā laracukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ melvaruñ cān=ti maṟṟiyvaraṇ karuti Iru
ttiya cempoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyu māpporu taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakecaripaṉmarāṉa śrīrājeṅra co
ḻatevarkku yāṇṭu 8 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu maṇaiyiṟkoṭṭattup puricaināṭṭu Uroṭakat
tu śrīrājarājaīśvara muṭaiya mahaāde varkku Uṭaiyār śrīrājendra coḻatevar vaiytta tirunan=tā viḷakku Iraṇṭiṉā
l Āṭu nūṟṟeṇpatu .
Digital edition of SII 5.881 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
